name: circuit-trader
description: Circuit Trader — an autonomous BNB-chain trading agent that cannot trade unless its own signed risk constitution allows it. BNB HACK: AI Trading Agent Edition.

scripts.test: npm -w packages/policy run test && npm -w packages/connectors run test
scripts.build:connectors: npm run build:policy && npm -w packages/connectors run build
scripts.build:web: npm run build:connectors && npm -w apps/web run build
